productName: SUBX SUPREME Live Batter - Poipu Rain - 1g
description: Creamy blond hybrid badder made from Poipu Rain — the whipping process draws the terpenes forward, giving this batter-textured dab a loud, fragrant nose. Smooth, blond, and aromatic, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
